    Methods in edu.bu.pas.risk.territory that return types with arguments of type TerritoryCard
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<TerritoryCard>
    TerritoryCard.generateCards(Board board)
    In risk, each territory gets 1 card, and then there are 2 wild cards.
    static List<List<TerritoryCard>>
    TerritoryCard.getValidGroupings(List<TerritoryCard> cards)
    Returns an immutable list of all valid combinations of cards you can turn in.
    Method parameters in edu.bu.pas.risk.territory with type arguments of type TerritoryCard
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<List<TerritoryCard>>
    TerritoryCard.getValidGroupings(List<TerritoryCard> cards)
    Returns an immutable list of all valid combinations of cards you can turn in.
    static boolean
    TerritoryCard.hasValidTrade(List<TerritoryCard> cards)
    Returns true iff any combination of 3 cards from the given list forms a valid grouping that can be traded in for armies.
    static boolean
    TerritoryCard.isValidGrouping(List<TerritoryCard> cards)
    Returns true iff one of the following conditions are met: 3 cards of the same army value 1 of each of the 3 army values any 2 plus a wild card
